title: PREPARATION — COMMERCIAL SERVICE TOOLS

figures_detected.description: Spark plug wrench — 16 mm (0.63 in) socket wrench
Valve seat cutter set — finishing valve seat dimensions
Piston ring expander — removing and installing piston ring
Valve guide drift — showing dimensions A and B for intake and exhaust: A = 9.5 mm (0.374 in) dia., B = 5.5 mm (0.217 in) dia.
Valve guide reamer — reaming valve guide (1) or hole for oversize valve guide (2): D1 = 5.5 mm (0.217 in), D2 = 9.68 mm (0.381 in)
Front oil seal drift — installing front oil seal: A = 75 mm (2.95 in) dia., B = 45 mm (1.77 in) dia.
Rear oil seal drift — installing rear oil seal: A = 110 mm (4.33 in) dia., B = 80 mm (3.15 in) dia.
